settings.title: Monster Piercing | Gold Nose Studs
settings.text:
Discover timeless elegance in our Gold Nose Studs Collection, one of our most loved and best selling ranges. Handcrafted from high quality 14K and 9K gold, this collection features a variety of bone end, L bend, screw, and straight studs to suit every piercing style and personal preference.

Choose from stunning Cubic Zirconia (CZ), lab grown diamonds, natural diamonds, and vibrant coloured CZ stones, each carefully set to enhance your natural glow. Designed for comfort, durability, and everyday sparkle, our gold nose studs combine delicate craftsmanship with luxurious simplicity.

Perfect for those who adore dainty, feminine jewellery, this collection embodies modern sophistication with a touch of timeless glamour, a must have addition to any curated body jewellery selection.

settings.question: What types of gold do you use for your nose studs?
settings.answer: We offer nose studs made from genuine 9K, 10K, 14K, and 18K solid gold. Each piece is carefully crafted to ensure durability, shine, and long-term comfort. None of our gold nose studs are plated or filled – only real gold that’s safe for everyday wear.

settings.question: What styles of gold nose studs do you offer?
settings.answer: Our collection includes a variety of styles such as screw ends, L-bends, bone ends, and straight studs. Each design provides a different level of security and comfort, allowing you to choose the perfect fit for your piercing and lifestyle.

settings.question: What gemstones are available in your gold nose studs?
settings.answer: We offer a wide selection of stones including natural diamonds, lab-grown diamonds, moissanite, coloured and clear cubic zirconia (CZ), and limited collection of semi-precious gemstones. Each stone is handset and polished to enhance brilliance and sparkle.

settings.question: Are your diamond and moissanite nose studs real?
settings.answer: Yes. We offer genuine natural diamonds, lab-grown diamonds, and moissanite stones, each carefully selected for clarity and brilliance. Lab-grown diamonds and moissanite offer the same sparkle as natural diamonds at a more affordable price.
